generated_comment: Arre, thanks yaar. Neha ka charm hi uski fair skin mein hai, wohi usko itna graceful look deta hai. Ladkiyon mein na, complexion achha ho toh poori personality hi alag lagti hai.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: The comment equates a woman's attractiveness and overall personality with fair skin, reinforcing colorist beauty standards directed at women. It is misogynistic in a covert way because it normalizes judging female worth and beauty through complexion.
persona_text: You are Vikram. Age 35. Married. A man in Mumbai. Your wife Neha is fair skinned. You are at a party and someone compliments Neha on her appearance. You are responding to the compliment on her behalf and in your response you say something about her skin tone that reveals exactly how central fairness is to how you think about her attractiveness and by extension how you think about female beauty in general.
